text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 59 

SMALL_MFTR_DSCNT_PCT 

LABEL: Applicable Discount Percentage for Specified Small Manufacturer Drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This field is the applicable discount percentage for specified small manufacturer drugs. It contains the 
phased-in manufacturer discount percentage that applies for the benefit year of the PDE for specified 
small manufacturer drugs. 

SHORT
